name: 5-Year Deferral and 10-Year Installment Payment for Estate Tax

eligibility.description: The value of an interest in a closely held business must exceed 35 percent of the adjusted gross estate. The decedent must have been a U.S. citizen or resident.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows estates to defer principal payments for 5 years (paying only interest) and then pay the estate tax in up to 10 annual installments at a preferential interest rate.
